items.title: UPQODE website launch blocked — approval needed
items.summary: Website team cannot push to production without final approval on copy changes. Client demo scheduled for tomorrow morning.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve copy changes or flag remaining edits so team can launch before tomorrow's demo.

items.title: Netlify credits exhausted — service interruption
items.summary: Netlify team has used all available credits and needs top-up to restore full service.
items.actionNeeded: Approve credit top-up for Netlify to restore hosting service.

items.title: LeadMaker SDR proposal follow-up
items.summary: LeadMaker following up on full-time SDR proposal for inbound lead management and appointment setting.
items.actionNeeded: Review proposal and decide whether to schedule call to evaluate SDR candidates or decline.
